meta.title: Leviathan — Universal Agent Runtime
meta.description: Ship autonomous agents that compose, evolve, and self-correct.

props.title: Build agents that actually work
props.subtitle: Leviathan is the universal runtime for autonomous coding agents. Contract-first architecture, fractal config, deterministic execution.

props.title: Contract-First Development
props.content: Define schemas before writing code. Every module boundary is a typed contract — Zod schemas, LevEvent types, validation gates. No surprises at runtime.

props.title: Fractal Configuration
props.content: Config composes across scopes — system, project, module, runtime. One resolver chain, infinite depth. Override anything at any level without config sprawl.

props.title: Multi-Model Routing
props.content: Route tasks to the right model. Opus for architecture, Sonnet for implementation, Haiku for research. One command, automatic selection based on task complexity.

props.title: Plugin Ecosystem
props.content: 18 core plugins spanning SDLC, visualization, research, and operations. Write your own with a config.yaml and a handler function.

props.title: Deterministic GenUI
props.content: POST JSON, get beautiful HTML in <2ms. The lev.now engine renders dashboards, reports, and documentation without LLM latency or hallucination.

props.title: Event-Sourced State
props.content: Every agent action is a LevEvent persisted to a canonical log. Full audit trail, replay any session, debug any failure. Time travel for agents.

props.title: Sarah Chen
props.label: Staff Engineer, Anthropic
props.content: Leviathan's contract-first approach means our agents **actually compose** instead of silently breaking at module boundaries. The fractal config alone saved us weeks of integration work.

props.title: Marcus Rivera
props.label: CTO, AgentStack
props.content: We replaced 4 different agent frameworks with Leviathan. The event-sourced state means we can **replay and debug any agent session** — something no other runtime gives you.

props.title: Priya Patel
props.label: Head of AI, Scale AI
props.content: The deterministic GenUI engine is a game changer. Our agents produce beautiful reports **in 2ms** instead of waiting 30 seconds for an LLM to hallucinate HTML.

props.title: Open Source
props.label: Free forever
props.content: Full runtime, 18 plugins, community support. Self-hosted, no telemetry, no lock-in. MIT licensed.

props.title: Pro
props.label: $49/mo per seat
props.content: Everything in Open Source plus managed model routing, team dashboards, priority support, and private plugin registry.

props.title: Enterprise
props.label: Custom pricing
props.content: SOC2 compliance, SSO, on-prem deployment, dedicated success manager, custom integrations, SLA guarantees.

props.title: Ready to build?
props.subtitle: Install Leviathan in 30 seconds and ship your first agent today.
